routes.name: Field Station to Camp Yoho (1906 approach march)
routes.description: The march of July 9, 1906. Crossed Kicking-Horse bridge, 7-mile forest road to Emerald Lake Chalet, traverse of northern glacial delta with stream crossings, 1000-ft cliff ascent through spruce forest to Yoho Pass summit.

routes.name: Official Climb of The Vice-President
routes.description: From camp, trail to Yoho Pass summit, right to Michael Peak shoulder near timber-line, long rock slide, steep snow slopes to arete, knife-edge arete to Angle Peak, snowfield walk to summit.

routes.name: Yoho Valley Round Trip (2-day)
routes.description: Lower trail past Takakkaw Falls and Laughing Falls to Twin Falls and Yoho Glacier, overnight at Laughing Falls camp, return by upper trail with views of entire 15-mile valley.

routes.name: Emerald Glacier Trip
routes.description: From camp, partly same route as Upper Yoho trail to Inspiration Point, then left turn toward glacier foot. Stiff ascent over boulders. Snow line at ~8000 ft. Ice-step climbing to main icefield with seracs and crevasses.

routes.name: Burgess Pass Return Route
routes.description: Return from camp to Mt. Stephen House via Burgess Pass trail. Views of President Range, Emerald mountains, glaciers, Emerald Lake below.
